key.name: fade-duration
key.description: How long the trail takes to fade out in milliseconds

key.name: line-width
key.description: Thickness of the mouse trail line

key.name: color
key.description: Color of the mouse trail as RGB values

key.name: alpha
key.description: Transparency level of the mouse trail (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque)

key.name: render-mode
key.description: Rendering mode for the mouse trail: "precise" for segmented smooth curves, "balance" for unified smooth curves, or "fast" for simple lines

key.name: color-mode
key.description: Color mode for the mouse trail: "solid" for single color with fade, "rainbow-fixed" for fixed-length rainbow gradient, "rainbow-ratio" for ratio-based rainbow gradient, or "rainbow-time" for time-based cycling rainbow

key.name: rainbow-fixed-config
key.description: Configuration for fixed-length rainbow mode. Each line: #RRGGBB distance(px). The last color does not need a distance.

key.name: rainbow-ratio-config
key.description: Configuration for ratio rainbow mode. Each line: #RRGGBB ratio(positive number). Values are normalized automatically.

key.name: rainbow-time-config
key.description: Configuration for time-based rainbow mode. Each line: #RRGGBB time(ms). All colors must have a time.
